title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: A YouTube review demonstrating how to set up a sovereign local AI stack on a ZimaBoard 2 compact server, installing OpenClaw (a community fork of Cloud Code), wiring it to Venice AI, and configuring a Telegram bot for autonomous AI news briefing via Apify scraping. The video showcases a practical self-hosted alternative to cloud-based AI services without enterprise hardware or vendor lock-in.
